lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਜਾਹਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant sahaaee naanakaa varatai sabh jaahar |1|
lines.english: The Support of the Saints, O Nanak, is manifest, pervading everywhere. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਦੇ ਖੁਹਦੇ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਮਾਰਿਅਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਆਹਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: rahade khuhade nindak maarian kar aape aahar |
lines.english: By their own efforts, the slanderers have destroyed all remnants of themselves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿੰਨੈ ਮਾਰੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tinai maare naanakaa ji karan kaaran samarath |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are struck down by the All-powerful, the Cause of causes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਢਹੁ ਭੁਲੇ ਮੁੰਢ ਤੇ ਕਿਥੈ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਹਥੁ ॥
lines.translit: mundtahu bhule mundt te kithai paaein hath |
lines.english: Those who went astray from the Primal Being in the very beginning - where can they find refuge?

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈ ਫਾਹੇ ਰਾਤੀ ਤੁਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: lai faahe raatee tureh prabh jaanai praanee |
lines.english: They take the noose in their hands, and go out at night to strangle others, but God knows everything, O mortal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree 5 |
lines.english: Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਕਹਿ ਨਾਰਿ ਪਰਾਈਆ ਲੁਕਿ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਠਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: takeh naar paraaeea luk andar tthaanee |
lines.english: They spy on other men's women, concealed in their hiding places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੀ ਆਪੋ ਆਪਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਪਛੁਤਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: karamee aapo aapanee aape pachhutaanee |
lines.english: But they shall come to regret their actions - they create their own karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਨੑੀ ਦੇਨੑਿ ਵਿਖੰਮ ਥਾਇ ਮਿਠਾ ਮਦੁ ਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sanaee dena vikham thaae mitthaa mad maanee |
lines.english: They break into well-protected places, and revel in sweet wine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਰਾਈਲੁ ਫਰੇਸਤਾ ਤਿਲ ਪੀੜੇ ਘਾਣੀ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: ajaraaeel faresataa til peerre ghaanee |27|
lines.english: Azraa-eel, the Angel of Death, shall crush them like sesame seeds in the oil-press. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜਾ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸੇ ਪਚਿ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਅਜਾਣ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: doojaa sevan naanakaa se pach pach mue ajaan |1|
lines.english: Those ignorant ones who serve duality, O Nanak, rot, waste away and die. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸਚੇ ਸਾਹ ਕੇ ਸੇਈ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: sevak sache saah ke seee paravaan |
lines.english: The servants of the True King are acceptable and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲੇਖੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਟਣਾ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa lekh prabh mettanaa na jaae |
lines.english: That destiny which was pre-ordained by God from the very beginning cannot be erased.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਵਖਰੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan vakharo naanak sadaa dhiaae |2|
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord's Name is Nanak's capital; he meditates on it forever. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰਾਇਣਿ ਲਇਆ ਨਾਠੂੰਗੜਾ ਪੈਰ ਕਿਥੈ ਰਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: naaraaein leaa naatthoongarraa pair kithai rakhai |
lines.english: One who has received a kick from the Lord God - where can he place his foot?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree 5 |
lines.english: Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਦਾ ਪਾਪ ਅਮਿਤਿਆ ਨਿਤ ਵਿਸੋ ਚਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: karadaa paap amitiaa nit viso chakhai |
lines.english: He commits countless sins, and continually eats poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਦਾ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਦੇਹੀ ਭਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: nindaa karadaa pach muaa vich dehee bhakhai |
lines.english: Slandering others, he wastes away and dies; within his body, he burns.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਕਉਣੁ ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਰਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: sachai saahib maariaa kaun tis no rakhai |
lines.english: One who has been struck down by the True Lord and Master - who can save him now?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਘੋਰ ਬਹੁ ਦੁਖ ਘਣੇ ਅਕਿਰਤਘਣਾ ਕਾ ਥਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: narak ghor bahu dukh ghane akirataghanaa kaa thaan |
lines.english: In the most horrible hell, there is terrible pain and suffering. It is the place of the ungrateful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜੋ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਲਖੈ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak tis saranaagatee jo purakh alakhai |28|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of the Unseen Lord, the Primal Being. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਹੋਇ ਮੁਏ ਹਰਾਮੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tin prabh maare naanakaa hoe hoe mue haraam |1|
lines.english: They are struck down by God, O Nanak, and they die a most miserable death. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਖਧ ਸਭੇ ਕੀਤਿਅਨੁ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕਾ ਦਾਰੂ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: avakhadh sabhe keetian nindak kaa daaroo naeh |
lines.english: All kinds of medicines may be prepared, but there is no cure for the slanderer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: paurree 5 |
lines.english: Pauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਸਿ ਦਿਤਾ ਪੂਰੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਅਖੁਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: tus ditaa poorai satiguroo har dhan sach akhutt |
lines.english: By His Pleasure, the True Guru has blessed me with the inexhaustible wealth of the Name of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਪਚਿ ਪਚਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap bhulaae naanakaa pach pach jonee paeh |2|
lines.english: Those whom the Lord Himself misleads, O Nanak, putrefy and rot in reincarnation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਅੰਦੇਸੇ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਛੁਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh andese mitt ge jam kaa bhau chhutt |
lines.english: All my anxiety is ended; I am rid of the fear of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਬੁਰਿਆਈਆਂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਤੁਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh buriaaeean sang saadhoo tutt |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger and other evils have been subdued in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਸਚੇ ਦੂਜਾ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਹੁਇ ਮਰਸਨਿ ਬੁਟੁ ॥
lines.translit: vin sache doojaa sevade hue marasan butt |
lines.english: Those who serve another, instead of the True Lord, die unfulfilled in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਬਖਸਿਆ ਨਾਮੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਜੁਟੁ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak kau gur bakhasiaa naamai sang jutt |29|
lines.english: The Guru has blessed Nanak with forgiveness; he is united with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੋ ਦੇ ਸਦਿਆ ਸਤੈ ਦੀ ਭਿਖਿਆ ਲਏ ਨਾਹੀ ਪਿਛੋ ਦੇ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ਕੈ ਆਣਿ ਤਪੈ ਪੁਤੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਬਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ago de sadiaa satai dee bhikhiaa le naahee pichho de pachhutaae kai aan tapai put vich bahaaliaa |
lines.english: When this penitent was first invited, he refused our charity; but later he repented and sent his son, who was seated in the congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪਾ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਅੰਦ੍ਰਹੁ ਲੋਭੀ ਨਿਤ ਮਾਇਆ ਨੋ ਫਿਰੈ ਜਜਮਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tapaa na hovai andrahu lobhee nit maaeaa no firai jajamaaliaa |
lines.english: He is not a penitent, who is greedy within his heart, and who constantly chases after Maya like a leper.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਲੋਗ ਸਭਿ ਹਸਣ ਲਗੇ ਤਪਾ ਲੋਭਿ ਲਹਰਿ ਹੈ ਗਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: panch log sabh hasan lage tapaa lobh lehar hai gaaliaa |
lines.english: The village elders all laughed, saying that the waves of greed have destroyed this penitent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਥੋੜਾ ਧਨੁ ਵੇਖੈ ਤਿਥੈ ਤਪਾ ਭਿਟੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਧਨਿ ਬਹੁਤੈ ਡਿਠੈ ਤਪੈ ਧਰਮੁ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jithai thorraa dhan vekhai tithai tapaa bhittai naahee dhan bahutai dditthai tapai dharam haariaa |
lines.english: If he sees only a little wealth, he does not bother to go there; but when he sees a lot of wealth, the penitent forsakes his vows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਏਹੁ ਤਪਾ ਨ ਹੋਵੀ ਬਗੁਲਾ ਹੈ ਬਹਿ ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਵੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee ehu tapaa na hovee bagulaa hai beh saadh janaa veechaariaa |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, he is not a penitent - he is only a stork. Sitting together, the Holy Congregation has so decided.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤ ਪੁਰਖ ਕੀ ਤਪਾ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰੈ ਸੰਸਾਰੈ ਕੀ ਉਸਤਤੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਏਤੁ ਦੋਖੈ ਤਪਾ ਦਯਿ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sat purakh kee tapaa nindaa karai sansaarai kee usatatee vich hovai et dokhai tapaa day maariaa |
lines.english: The penitent slanders the True Primal Being, and sings the praises of the material world. For this sin, he is cursed by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਪੁਰਖਾਂ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਾ ਵੇਖੁ ਜਿ ਤਪੇ ਨੋ ਫਲੁ ਲਗਾ ਸਭੁ ਗਇਆ ਤਪੇ ਕਾ ਘਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa purakhaan kee nindaa kaa vekh ji tape no fal lagaa sabh geaa tape kaa ghaaliaa |
lines.english: Behold the fruit the penitent gathers, for slandering the Great Primal Being; all his labors have gone in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਬਹੈ ਪੰਚਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਤਪਾ ਸਦਾਏ ॥ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਬਹੈ ਤਪਾ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਏ ॥ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਦਰਲਾ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੰਚਾ ਨੋ ਉਘਾ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: baahar bahai panchaa vich tapaa sadaae | andar bahai tapaa paap kamaae | har andaralaa paap panchaa no ughaa kar vekhaaliaa |
lines.english: When he sits outside among the elders, he is called a penitent; But when he sits within the congregation, the penitent commits sin. The Lord has exposed the penitent's secret sin to the elders.
